query:
SELECT 
                COALESCE(tier_ov.override_tier, 1) as tier,
                COUNT(*) as "count: i64"
            FROM pull_requests pr
            LEFT JOIN tier_overrides tier_ov ON pr.repo_name = tier_ov.repo_name AND pr.pr_number = tier_ov.pr_number
            WHERE pr.opened_at >= ? AND pr.opened_at <= ?
            GROUP BY tier
            ORDER BY tier
